purpose: Monitoring companion app for DENG Tool: Rejoin
changelog: Package rows now appear immediately on the main menu (username title, package name subtitle, Dead badge when not playing).
Package rows update live after pressing Start in Termux; runtime is computed from the supervisor's online timestamp.
Snapshot capture is wired through the Termux screencap subprocess; APK Snapshot screen shows 'Snapshot is off. Enable it in Settings.' when interval is 0.
Settings screen is now vertically scrollable with navigation-bar / IME padding so the snapshot-interval rows are always reachable.
All user-facing timestamps now render as '28 Mei 2026, 4:35 PM' (Indonesian month names, 12h AM/PM).
All bridge HTTPS is now routed via curl subprocess on Termux to isolate the libssl3 EVP_PKEY_generate SIGSEGV captured in probe p-d1cb86fd89 (no more idle segfault while AFK in the top menu).
Backend /api/monitor/bridge/push now echoes monitor_settings so changing snapshot interval in the APK takes effect without relaunching Termux.
Stable v1.0.0 Termux package was rebuilt with the same monitoring fixes; /install/v1.0.0 and /install/latest both serve the fixed artifact.
